query: grill me on this — I'm about to rewrite our auth flow to use refresh-token rotation and I want to be sure I've thought through the edge cases before I touch any code
can you interview me about this caching design and then have a second model poke holes in it? I keep flip-flopping on the TTLs and eviction policy
before I start building the billing webhook handler, stress-test my plan: ask me the hard questions first, then get codex to tear it apart
i wanna build a rate limiter for our api gateway. quiz me on the design first one question at a time and then get an outside opinion before i write anything
interview me about whether to use SSE or websockets for the live dashboard, then have another model adversarially review whatever approach we settle on
play devil's advocate on my plan to shard the events table — drill into my assumptions, then bring in codex to attack it before I commit
I'm about to refactor the whole notification system. really pressure-test my thinking and have a second AI critique the plan before I build it
help me harden this RFC before I send it to the team — grill me on the gaps then get an adversarial read from codex
lock down a plan with me for the OAuth integration. interrogate me until we've nailed the decisions, then second-model review it
I keep building things and regretting the design later. for this new search-indexing pipeline, can you question me hard up front and then have codex sanity-check the locked plan?
I already wrote out the migration plan, it's in MIGRATION.md. get codex to sanity-check it and flag anything wrong or risky
cross-check these security-audit findings I produced against the actual code — are any of them false positives?
I just finished reviewing PR #42 and wrote up my comments. get a second opinion on whether my findings actually hold before I post them
review my changes on this branch for bugs and anything sloppy before I open a PR
here's the spec — just build me a CLI flag parser that handles --verbose, --output and --dry-run, no need to overthink it
interview me for a blog post about my career as a backend engineer — ask me about projects I'm proud of
land PR #88 for me — check CI is green, run the test suite, merge it and clean up the branch
here's my finalized architecture doc. tell me whether switching to event sourcing is the right call — is it sound?
research the tradeoffs between Temporal and a homegrown job queue for our use case and write me up a report with sources
quiz me on system design interview questions, I've got an onsite at a big tech company next week
